title: Waxed Item Frame
description: A mod to allow players to "lock" an item frame by using Honeycomb on it. "Locked" item frames cannot have items rotated or removed and will allow players to click "through" the item frame to interact with the block behind it instead of the item frame.
body:
# Waxed Item frame
A minecraft mod to allow players to wax an item frame by using Honeycomb on it. Waxed Item frames prevent the item they hold from being rotated or removed while also allowing the player to click through the item frame to interact with the block behind it.

## Key Features
### 1.0.1
- Fixes crash on launch due to extra quotation mark in description
### 1.0.0
- Initial Release

## Usage
1. Apply Honeycomb directly to item frame (with an item in it) to wax it
2. Right-clicking on (using) a waxed item frame will interact with the block behind the item frame
3. Using an axe on a waxed item frame will remove the wax and return the item frame to normal
